top_claims.claim: Total Assets moved +21.9% versus the prior period (6,727.0 to 8,197.0).
Leadership / governance on watch. 16 executive sales ($2,841,902) in 120d

Yum! Brands is a global QSR franchisor: $68.3 billion of FY2025 system sales across KFC, Taco Bell, Pizza Hut, and Habit, with 97% franchised units and $1.64 billion of FY2025 free cash flow (~$5.83 per share). Same-store sales were +3% in FY2025; system sales grew +4% reported. Taco Bell ($18.4 billion system sales, 9

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Pizza Hut continues losing share to delivery-native competitors, triggering franchisee closures and royalty pressure faster than KFC/Taco Bell growth can offset. [Fact] Pizza Hut system sales $12.8 billion on 19,974 units versus Taco Bell $18.4 billion on only 9,030 units implies weaker unit productivity
Leverage: $11.9 billion long-term debt constrains buybacks in a rate or earnings shock (10-K FY2025).
Habit drag: Company-owned Habit units (79% of U.S. Habit) with minimal division profit (~$13 million operating profit on $706 million system sales) (10-K segment note).
